title: TurboQuant Explained..
summary: TurboQuant is a Google technique that uses vector quantization and KV cache quantization to reduce VRAM requirements and improve GPU efficiency in large language models. The method employs codebook-based quantization with mean squared error and inner product error metrics to compress model activations.
